assessment.club_or_team_contamination: No club contamination detected; all ten rows are Norway senior national-team matches from API-Football.
assessment.rolling_window: The current feature uses exactly ten matches and averages 19.3 shots per match, which clips to the maximum rating of 100.
assessment.opponent_strength: Six of ten matches are against Moldova, Estonia, or Israel. The 34-shot, 11-1 Moldova match is a clear schedule-strength driver.
assessment.confederation_fairness: The production feature has no opponent- or confederation-strength normalization. The tested confederation adjustment was slightly worse than current v4 on holdout Brier, log loss, and calibration.

decision.reason: Current v4 remains the best tested holdout model (current_v4_weight_0_2). Every requested alternative worsened Brier score and log loss, so no production change was applied.
